title: Joki completes an order after settlement
description: A Joki can finish the full shopping workflow by uploading a receipt, entering the actual amount, and completing the order.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the order is marked completed

title: Create a buyer order from a market
description: This verifies that a buyer can add items, set an estimated budget, and submit a new market order successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a product item with quantity and notes
Add another product item with quantity and notes
Enter a valid estimated shopping amount
Verify the created order detail page is displayed
Verify the new order is shown as created

title: Joki accepts an available order
description: A Joki can open available orders and accept one so it moves into the assigned state.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the order is shown as assigned

title: Log in and land in the correct role experience
description: This verifies that a user can sign in and is redirected to the experience that matches their role.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the role-appropriate page

title: Joki starts shopping on an assigned order
description: A Joki can open an assigned order and move it into shopping so the workflow progresses correctly.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the order status changes to shopping

title: Joki sees accepted orders in assigned orders
description: After accepting an order, a Joki can confirm it appears in the assigned orders view.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the accepted order is listed in assigned orders

title: Review buyer order history and open an order detail
description: This verifies that a buyer can view order history and open an existing order to inspect its status.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to view order history
Open one of the listed orders
Verify the order detail view is displayed
Verify the order status information is visible

title: Admin triggers checklist aggregation
description: An admin can manually trigger aggregation and see master checklists generated for grouped orders.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a generated master checklist is displayed

title: Admin opens a generated checklist to inspect grouped orders
description: An admin can open a generated master checklist and inspect the grouped orders and items inside it.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify grouped order items are displayed

title: Keep order creation blocked when required details are missing
description: This verifies that incomplete buyer order information is rejected with validation feedback instead of creating an order.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a product item with quantity and notes
Verify order validation feedback is visible

title: Joki sees an additional payment when spending more than estimated
description: A Joki can review the settlement outcome and see an additional payment when the actual amount exceeds the estimate.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter an actual shopping amount higher than the estimate
Verify an additional payment amount is shown

title: Browse the welcome page and open the sign-in options
description: This verifies that a new visitor can explore the landing page and reach the authentication options from the main call to action.

steps.description: Scroll through the page to the feature and market sections
Scroll through the page to the user ratings section
Click the primary call to action to continue
Verify the sign-in and registration options are displayed

title: Joki sees a refund when spending less than estimated
description: A Joki can review the settlement outcome and see a refund when the actual amount is below the estimate.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter an actual shopping amount lower than the estimate
Verify a refund amount is shown

title: Reach the registration page from the welcome page
description: This verifies that a visitor can move from the landing page into the registration flow.

steps.description: Click the registration option from the main call to action area
Verify the registration page is displayed
